title: EC Global Payments Hero
html_prompt: Create a responsive single-file HTML/CSS/JS landing-page hero for EC LAB / ec 的实验室 with a soft white rounded page shell on a pale gray background, clean top navigation, large centered global payments headline, mixed sans and italic serif typography, blue-accent CTA buttons, a subtle grid-and-glow hero background, floating 3D-style payment icon tiles, cropped mobile app mockups, and muted trust-logo footer. Use no external assets, no CDN, no frameworks, and no external images. Build all visual elements with HTML, CSS, inline SVG, gradients, blur, shadows, borders, and text. Preserve the final design structure, proportions, spacing, cool blue-white color temperature, glassy depth, and soft fintech texture. Use EC content such as EC LAB, ec 的实验室, AI Workflow, Design, Prompt, Code, Inspiration, and Reusable Assets where appropriate. Use only EC font sets and EC radius tokens.

css.--blur: blur filters, radial glow, masked grid fade
css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
